org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.grpc

类 GrpcProtocol.GrpcRemotingServer

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.AbstractProxyProtocol.RemotingServerAdapter
      • org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.grpc.GrpcProtocol.GrpcRemotingServer
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Resetable, Endpoint, IdleSensible, RemotingServer
    封闭类:
    GrpcProtocol

    public class GrpcProtocol.GrpcRemotingServer
extends AbstractProxyProtocol.RemotingServerAdapter
